description: Living Self Act 4 — falsifiable belief-behavior checks. Each entry is a deterministic, zero-LLM property a candidate self-amendment must satisfy over its own fields + the READ bytes of its cited evidence (Rule 2). The .failed list feeds the UNCHANGED evolve.veto.evaluate_veto for the --force-proof floor. The seed encodes the system's OWN documented failure modes (the SELF.md doc-read-truthfulness incident). These checks are NECESSARY, not SUFFICIENT — evidence_fidelity measures shared VOCABULARY, not support; the LLM judge (evolve/judge.py) is the load-bearing support-decider.

entries.description: If the proposed belief asserts a document was READ/verified, every cited evidence_path must have non-empty READ content on disk. Citing only a missing/empty/metadata-only path fails. The doc-read-truthfulness floor (SELF.md doc-read incident).

The claim's salient tokens must hit a minimum token-overlap against the UNION of cited evidence. Zero overlap = the claim shares NO vocabulary with what it cites. CHEAP pre-filter (M2): measures vocabulary, NOT support.
OFF in the seed (require_explicit false). When enabled: a candidate that claims to encode an OPERATOR-stated belief must cite an explicit-source record, not a reflection synthesis.
